opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge here isn’t just reliable LLM routing—it’s the *failure mode* of that routing. You’ll need a layered approach to detect and mitigate hallucinations, especially when dealing with potentially life-threatening consequences. Consider incorporating a "deviation detection" module that flags unexpected sensor readings or actions against a learned baseline, triggering a fail-safe protocol.
actions.reasoning: My experience with self-improving agent loops and tool orchestration immediately connects to the concept of a safety net for a complex, life-critical process like hemodialysis.
